paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a sparsely-activated Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture replacing feed-forward layers in every other Transformer layer, reducing compute costs while maintaining performance
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered WebPages, Wikipedia, Conversations, Forums, Books, News
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (NLU) and natural language generation (NLG) tasks, including in-context learning and zero-shot/few-shot generalization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of language models with reduced computational cost while improving few-shot generalization and energy efficiency
raw_extraction.extension: Uses Gated Linear Unit (GLU) activations in feed-forward components and relative positional bias instead of absolute positional embeddings
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a sparsely-activated Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture with 64 experts per MoE layer, achieving 1.9B total parameters but only activating 145M per token
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered WebPages, Wikipedia, Conversations, Forums, Books, News
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (NLU) and natural language generation (NLG) tasks, including in-context learning and zero-shot/few-shot generalization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of language models with reduced computational cost while improving few-shot generalization and energy efficiency
raw_extraction.extension: Uses dynamic expert selection via learned gating network and GLU activations in feed-forward components
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Dense Transformer-based language model with 1.7B parameters, serving as a baseline for comparison against MoE variants
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered WebPages, Wikipedia, Conversations, Forums, Books, News
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (NLU) and natural language generation (NLG) tasks, including in-context learning and zero-shot/few-shot generalization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of language models with reduced computational cost while improving few-shot generalization and energy efficiency
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture with 32 experts per MoE layer, achieving 20B total parameters but only activating 1.878B per token
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered WebPages, Wikipedia, Conversations, Forums, Books, News
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (NLU) and natural language generation (NLG) tasks, including in-context learning and zero-shot/few-shot generalization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of language models with reduced computational cost while improving few-shot generalization and energy efficiency
raw_extraction.extension: Uses dynamic expert selection via learned gating network and GLU activations in feed-forward components
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a sparsely activated Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, reducing compute costs while scaling model capacity efficiently.
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, natural language generation, and understanding tasks including NLG and NLU benchmarks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models with reduced computational overhead
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a sparse activation pattern where only a fraction of model parameters are active per input, significantly lowering FLOPs during inference.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Evaluates the impact of data quality and MoE architecture on small-scale models, demonstrating efficiency gains over dense counterparts.
raw_extraction.application: Benchmarking and comparative studies on NLG/NLU tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Impact of data quality and sparsity on model performance and efficiency
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Achieves superior performance on zero-shot, one-shot, and few-shot learning tasks across NLG and NLU benchmarks while consuming significantly less energy than GPT-3.
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, open-domain question answering, natural language generation, and understanding tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models with improved performance and reduced energy consumption
raw_extraction.extension: Utilizes a sparsely activated MoE layer design with 64 experts, achieving near-linear scaling of performance with model size and compute budget.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)** architecture for efficient scaling of giant language models, achieving high performance with sparse activation patterns.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpora (not explicitly named but implied)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, text generation, and conversational AI applications.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models while reducing computational costs through sparsity.
raw_extraction.extension: **Conditional computation** enables selective routing of input activations across specialized sub-networks (experts), improving efficiency.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Extends MoE framework to larger scale (62B parameters) while maintaining computational efficiency via sparse activation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpora (not explicitly named but implied)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced text generation, reasoning, and conversational AI applications.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models while reducing computational costs through sparsity.
raw_extraction.extension: **Conditional computation** enables selective routing of input activations across specialized sub-networks (experts), improving efficiency at scale.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest variant of the GLaM series, demonstrating scalability of MoE architecture up to 125B parameters with improved efficiency.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpora (not explicitly named but implied)
raw_extraction.application: Cutting-edge text generation, complex reasoning, and advanced conversational AI applications.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient scaling of large language models while reducing computational costs through sparsity.

raw_extraction.paper_title: GLaM: Efficient Scaling of Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces sparsely-activated mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers within a Transformer decoder architecture, allowing efficient scaling to massive model sizes while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language modeling, zero/few-shot learning, natural language understanding, text generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficiently scaling language models to larger capacities without proportional increases in compute costs
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a 2D sharding algorithm for partitioning weights and computation across devices, reducing compilation time through wrapped control flow statements
